title: A Good Place
description: A mod that adds placement animations to blocks
body:
# A Good Place  

## 📖 About 📖

This mod adds fancy new animations for block placement.

 

The process is entirely customizable through the use of Resource Packs.
With this sytem you'll be able to customize every aspect of the animation starting from which block it affects to how the animation itself plays out, tweakable via various control points.

 

To edit the existing animation simply hop into your resource pack folder.

There you'll find a Sample Pack in which you can simply edit the only json file there. Be sure to read the Readme.md file for an in depth explaiantion or check out the WIKI here.

 

You Might have to enable the default texture pack in your resource pack folder when you first install this mod

 

Also be sure to share your custom animations with us!

 



## 🖼️ Media🖼️

 
![Default Animation](https://i.imgur.com/oZwNaFD.gif)


## 🔧 Customization🔧

 

As explained previously every aspect of the mod is fully customizable, starting from which blocks are affected to how they are animated.

To start simply go into your Resource Pack folder, there you'll find a sample pack already made for you.
You can edit its jsons files or add new ones to create one or more animations.
Here's an example of how the default animation json file looks like.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/067d30648495b9c11f95ec3624a6a8e2adc1cb6c.png)
